trails.name: Mutspitze (Cima Muta)
trails.tagline: The bold rock summit above Dorf Tirol.
trails.dog_note: Dogs welcome on the trail, but on the Hochmuth cable car the dog must wear a muzzle.

trailhead_info.parking: Take the Hochmuth cable car up from Dorf Tirol (park near the valley station in the village).

crowding.quiet_tip: Go early morning or in the afternoon (summer weather permitting).

highlights: Sweeping summit panorama over Merano, the Adige valley and the Texel Group
Gentle alpine-pasture walking as far as the Mutkopf inn
Short, steep final climb eased by wooden steps set into the ground
Quick access via the Hochmuth cable car from Dorf Tirol
Dog-friendly (muzzle required on the cable car)
trails.description:
From the top station of the Hochmuth cable car, route 23 sets off across open alpine pasture toward the Mutspitze. The walking is genuinely pleasant and not too hard all the way to Mutkopf — green slopes, wide views, an easy rhythm. From Mutkopf the character changes: after about 15 minutes the path tips into a steep, strenuous climb to the summit. Wooden steps set into the ground take some of the sting out of the ascent, and the final stretch — steep but short — brings you to the summit cross sooner than the effort suggests.

From the top the panorama is the reward: Merano and the Adige valley laid out below, the Vinschgau opening to the west toward the glaciated Ortler, the Sarntal Alps and the Ifinger to the east, and the crest of the Texel Group to the north. (Panorama peak-naming still to be fact-checked by the local.)

Many hikers continue along the ridge and descend to the Oberkaserhütte rather than returning the same way — that line will be added as a separate variant.

josephineNote.en: This one's right on my doorstep. Take it easy and enjoy the meadows up to Mutkopf — stop for a drink there — then dig in for the steep last push. The wooden steps help more than you'd think, and the view from the cross is one of my favourites above Merano.
josephineNote.it: Questa ce l'ho proprio dietro casa. Vai con calma e goditi i prati fino al Mutkopf — fermati per qualcosa da bere — poi stringi i denti per l'ultimo strappo ripido. I gradini di legno aiutano più di quanto pensi, e il panorama dalla croce è uno dei miei preferiti sopra Merano.
josephineNote.de: Den hab ich direkt vor der Haustür. Lass es bis zum Mutkopf gemütlich angehen und genieß die Wiesen — kehr dort auf einen Schluck ein — und beiß dann beim steilen Schlussanstieg die Zähne zusammen. Die Holzstufen helfen mehr, als du denkst, und der Blick vom Gipfelkreuz ist einer meiner liebsten über Meran.

text.en: The summit cross is the payoff — a sweeping panorama over Merano and the Adige valley, with the Texel Group filling the skyline.
text.it: La croce di vetta è la ricompensa — un panorama amplissimo su Merano e la Val d'Adige, con il Gruppo di Tessa a riempire l'orizzonte.
text.de: Das Gipfelkreuz ist der Lohn — ein weites Panorama über Meran und das Etschtal, mit der Texelgruppe am Horizont.

text.en: Easy pasture walking gets you to the Mutkopf inn — but save some legs: about 15 minutes on, the path tips into a steep, strenuous climb to the top. Wooden steps set into the ground take the sting out of it.
text.it: Una facile camminata sui pascoli ti porta al rifugio Mutkopf — ma tieni da parte un po' di gambe: circa 15 minuti dopo, il sentiero si impenna in una salita ripida e faticosa fino in cima. Gradini di legno nel terreno ne attenuano la durezza.
text.de: Gemütliches Almgehen bringt dich zur Mutkopf-Hütte — heb dir aber Kraft auf: rund 15 Minuten weiter wird der Weg zu einem steilen, anstrengenden Anstieg zum Gipfel. In den Boden gesetzte Holzstufen nehmen ihm die Schärfe.

text.en: Quick access is via the Hochmuth cable car from Dorf Tirol — note dogs need a muzzle for the ride up.
text.it: L'accesso rapido è con la funivia Hochmuth da Tirolo — ricorda che i cani devono indossare la museruola durante la salita.
text.de: Schneller Zustieg über die Hochmuth-Seilbahn von Dorf Tirol — Hunde brauchen für die Fahrt einen Maulkorb.

trails.name: Algunder Waalweg
trails.tagline: A gentle irrigation-channel promenade above Lagundo.
trails.dog_note: Dog-friendly promenade; keep dogs on a leash near homesteads and grazed plots.

trailhead_info.parking: Parking lot in Lagundo at the start of the Waalweg (~498 m).

crowding.quiet_tip: Quieter early morning or outside peak season.

highlights: Easy, near-level promenade following a centuries-old irrigation channel (Waal)
Panoramic decks over Merano, the Adige valley and Forst Castle
Passes the old Sant'Ippolito parish church and Thurnstein castle
A cold-water Kneipp fountain to refresh tired feet
Low altitude — one of the first walks in season and one of the last to close
trails.description: One of the best-known Waalwege around Merano, the Algunder Waalweg follows an old irrigation channel as a long, near-level promenade high above the rooftops of Lagundo. The walking is gentle and shaded in stretches, with views opening again and again over Merano, the Adige valley and Forst Castle. Along the way it passes panoramic platforms, the old Sant'Ippolito parish church, Thurnstein castle and a Kneipp water basin. Its low altitude makes it one of the first walks to come into season in spring and one of the last to close in late autumn.

josephineNote.en: A lovely easy one when you don't want a climb — flat, shady in places, and the views over Merano keep coming. Dip your feet in the Kneipp fountain on a warm day and take your time at the panoramic decks.
josephineNote.it: Una bella facile quando non hai voglia di salire — in piano, ombreggiata a tratti, e le viste su Merano non finiscono mai. In una giornata calda bagna i piedi alla fontana Kneipp e prenditi il tuo tempo alle terrazze panoramiche.
josephineNote.de: Eine schöne leichte Runde, wenn du nicht steigen willst — flach, stellenweise schattig, und der Blick auf Meran kommt immer wieder. An einem warmen Tag die Füße ins Kneippbecken halten und an den Panoramaterrassen Zeit lassen.

trails.name: Schloss Tirol & Brunnenburg Loop
trails.tagline: A castle loop down to the Waalweg and back — two fortresses, a gorge bridge, big views.
trails.dog_note: Dog-friendly on a leash; note the castles' own pet rules at the entrances.
highlights: Schloss Tirol — the medieval seat that gave Tyrol its name (now South Tyrol's history museum)
Brunnenburg below it, with its farming museum and rare alpine breeds
A suspension bridge over the gorge and a stretch of the famous Algunder Waalweg
A proper little loop: drop toward the valley, climb back by the old Schlossweg
Castle views, vineyards and a café stop or two along the way
trails.description: A varied loop straight from the centre of Dorf Tirol that strings together the area's headline sights. It sets off down the Brunnenburgsteig past the storybook Brunnenburg — a castle with a small farming museum and rare local breeds — crosses a gorge on a suspension bridge, and picks up a stretch of the well-known Algunder Waalweg with the Adige valley opening below. After a café stop the old Ochsentodweg and Schlossweg climb back up beneath Schloss Tirol, the medieval seat that gave the whole region its name and today holds the South Tyrolean museum of history. About 7 km with a real 400 m+ of up-and-down — easy underfoot but not flat.

josephineNote.en: A brilliant half-day on your doorstep — two castles, a wobbly bridge and a slice of the Waalweg, with a coffee stop to time it nicely. It dips down and climbs back, so bring proper shoes, not sandals. Check the castle museums' hours if you want to go in.
josephineNote.it: Una splendida mezza giornata dietro casa — due castelli, un ponte sospeso e un pezzo del Waalweg, con una sosta caffè al punto giusto. Scende e poi risale, quindi scarpe vere, non sandali. Controlla gli orari dei musei dei castelli se vuoi entrare.
josephineNote.de: Ein toller halber Tag vor der Haustür — zwei Schlösser, eine wackelige Brücke und ein Stück Waalweg, mit Kaffeepause zur rechten Zeit. Es geht hinunter und wieder hinauf, also feste Schuhe, keine Sandalen. Schau die Öffnungszeiten der Schlossmuseen an, wenn du hinein willst.

text.en: Worth a stop at Hotel-Restaurant Unterschattmair — a superb beef tartare and a beautifully balanced Aperol, taken on the terrace with the Adige valley spread out below.
text.it: Vale una sosta all'Hotel-Restaurant Unterschattmair — un ottimo tartare di manzo e un Aperol perfettamente equilibrato, in terrazza con la valle dell'Adige distesa sotto di te.
text.de: Ein Stopp beim Hotel-Restaurant Unterschattmair lohnt sich — ein hervorragendes Rindstatar und ein wunderbar ausgewogener Aperol, auf der Terrasse mit dem Etschtal unter dir.

text.en: Just below, Schloss Thurnstein does a sensational Kaiserschmarrn — the perfect reward along the way.
text.it: Poco più in basso, Schloss Thurnstein prepara un Kaiserschmarrn sensazionale — la ricompensa perfetta lungo il cammino.
text.de: Kurz darunter macht Schloss Thurnstein einen sensationellen Kaiserschmarrn — die perfekte Belohnung unterwegs.

text.en: Just past the church of St. Peter, heading back toward Dorf Tirol, there's a bench with a glorious view over the Adige — and to your right the church frames beautifully against the Vinschgau valley.
text.it: Appena passata la chiesa di San Pietro, tornando verso Tirolo, c'è una panchina con una vista stupenda sull'Adige — e alla tua destra la chiesa fa da cornice perfetta con la Val Venosta.
text.de: Kurz nach der St.-Peter-Kirche, zurück Richtung Dorf Tirol, steht eine Bank mit herrlichem Blick über die Etsch — und rechts rahmt die Kirche schön das Vinschgau ein.

text.en: Back in Dorf Tirol, treat yourself to a gelato at Sammy's Eislabor — the Kefir flavour, made with regional milk, is a standout.
text.it: Tornato a Tirolo, concediti un gelato da Sammy's Eislabor — il gusto Kefir, con latte regionale, è eccezionale.
text.de: Zurück in Dorf Tirol gönn dir ein Eis bei Sammy's Eislabor — die Sorte Kefir mit regionaler Milch ist ein Highlight.

trails.name: Falkner Promenade Loop (Weinweg)
trails.tagline: An easy vineyard promenade on the sunny terrace, looping back through the village.
trails.dog_note: Easy leash walk on promenades and village lanes.
highlights: Easy, near-level vineyard promenade (the Weinweg) on the sunny Dorf Tirol terrace
Rooftop views over the village, Merano and the Adige valley
Loops back through the village lanes — cafés and bars along the way
Short and gentle — perfect for a relaxed hour or a golden-hour stroll
trails.description: An easy, near-level promenade on the sunny terrace of Dorf Tirol that loops out along the Weinweg through the vineyards and back through the village lanes. The walking is gentle, with the rooftops of Dorf Tirol, Merano and the Adige valley opening below the whole way — a short, pretty round that asks no special effort and rewards with constant views, a café or two, and the relaxed rhythm of the village.

josephineNote.en: My evening go-to — twenty minutes of vineyard and view, then back into the village for a gelato or a drink as the light turns gold. No climb, no fuss, just the nicest little round on the terrace.
josephineNote.it: La mia passeggiata della sera — venti minuti di vigneto e panorama, poi di nuovo in paese per un gelato o un drink mentre la luce si fa dorata. Niente salita, niente fatica, solo il giretto più bello della terrazza.
josephineNote.de: Meine Abendrunde — zwanzig Minuten Weinberg und Aussicht, dann zurück ins Dorf für ein Eis oder einen Drink, wenn das Licht golden wird. Kein Anstieg, kein Aufwand, einfach die schönste kleine Runde auf der Terrasse.

trails.name: Meraner Höhenweg: Hochmuth → Leiteralm → Hochganghaus
trails.tagline: The classic balcony path into the Texelgruppe.
trails.dog_note: Dogs welcome; keep them on the lead on the slightly exposed climb to the Leiter Alm. Water source before the alm (can dry up in late summer).
highlights: A near-balcony stretch of the famous ~100 km Meraner Höhenweg, made a loop
Hochmuth (≈1,384 m) → Leiter Alm (≈1,520 m) → Hochganghaus (1,839 m)
Returns across the high pastures via the Mittlere Kuhalm
Pine-scented forest between the alms, with alm stops for goulash and Knödel
Big views over the Adige valley almost the whole way
trails.description: One of the most-loved opening stretches of the Meraner Höhenweg, the near-100 km balcony trail that rings the Texelgruppe. From the top of the Hochmuth cable car the Hans-Frieden-Weg runs west along the mountain's flank to the Leiter Alm and on up to the Hochganghaus, an alm-inn rebuilt in 2010 right on the high path. The walking is steady rather than steep — its signature moment a 55-metre suspension bridge spanning the Töllgraben — with the Adige valley open below almost the entire way. This version makes a full loop of it from the Hochmuth cable car, heading out to the Hochganghaus and returning across the high pastures by the Mittlere Kuhalm.

josephineNote.en: Take the cable car to Hochmuth and let the balcony do the work — gentle gradients, alm stops, and that wobbly bridge for a thrill. A brilliant first taste of the Höhenweg.
josephineNote.it: Prendi la funivia per l'Hochmuth e lascia fare al sentiero a mezzacosta — pendenze dolci, soste in malga e quel ponte sospeso per un brivido. Un assaggio splendido dell'Alta Via di Merano.
josephineNote.de: Nimm die Seilbahn auf den Hochmuth und lass den Höhenweg die Arbeit machen — sanfte Steigungen, Almeinkehr und die wackelige Hängebrücke für den Nervenkitzel. Ein toller erster Vorgeschmack auf den Höhenweg.

text.en: The Leiter Alm does a good goulash — a fine first stop on the high path.
text.it: La Leiter Alm fa un buon gulasch — un'ottima prima sosta sull'Alta Via.
text.de: Die Leiter Alm macht ein gutes Gulasch — ein schöner erster Halt am Höhenweg.

text.en: At the Hochganghaus, the canederli (Knödel) are the thing to order.
text.it: All'Hochganghaus, i canederli sono la cosa giusta da ordinare.
text.de: Im Hochganghaus sind die Knödel (canederli) genau das Richtige.

text.en: Dogs are welcome, but the stretch up to the Leiter Alm is a little exposed in places — keep your dog on the lead there to be safe.
text.it: I cani sono benvenuti, ma il tratto in salita verso la Leiter Alm è un po' esposto in alcuni punti — lì tieni il cane al guinzaglio per sicurezza.
text.de: Hunde sind willkommen, aber der Anstieg zur Leiter Alm ist stellenweise etwas ausgesetzt — halt deinen Hund dort zur Sicherheit an der Leine.

text.en: There's a water source on the way up before the Leiter Alm — handy for refilling (yours and the dog's), though it can run dry in late summer.
text.it: C'è una sorgente lungo la salita prima della Leiter Alm — comoda per riempire la borraccia (tua e del cane), anche se in tarda estate può prosciugarsi.
text.de: Auf dem Anstieg vor der Leiter Alm gibt es eine Wasserquelle — praktisch zum Nachfüllen (für dich und den Hund), im Spätsommer kann sie aber versiegen.

text.en: The forest between the Leiter Alm and the Hochganghaus is gorgeous — in summer the scent of sun-warmed pine follows you the whole way.
text.it: Il bosco tra la Leiter Alm e l'Hochganghaus è stupendo — in estate il profumo del pino scaldato dal sole ti accompagna lungo tutto il cammino.
text.de: Der Wald zwischen Leiter Alm und Hochganghaus ist wunderschön — im Sommer begleitet dich der Duft sonnenwarmer Kiefer den ganzen Weg.

trails.name: Spronser Seen (Sopranes Lakes)
trails.tagline: South Tyrol's greatest high-alpine lake district.
trails.dog_note: Only for fit, sure-footed dogs — long, high and exposed in places; keep them leashed on the airy sections. Plenty of water up high at the lakes and streams.
highlights: The first lakes of the Spronser See — South Tyrol's largest high-alpine lake district
Shares the lovely Hochmuth-to-Mutkopf approach with the Mutspitze
The Oberkaserhütte (~2,130 m) for goulash and a cold drink
A big mountain day — high, airy and rewarding (over 1,000 m of climb)
Wild lake basins far above the valley, ringed by the Texelgruppe peaks
trails.description: From the top station of the Hochmuth cable car the path sets off across open alpine pasture, climbing steadily and pleasantly as far as the Mutkopf inn — green slopes, wide views, an easy rhythm. From Mutkopf, rather than turning up to the Mutspitze, the route heads on into the high Spronser valley toward the lakes. This version visits the first two of the Spronser See — South Tyrol's largest high-alpine lake district — and the Oberkaserhütte at around 2,130 m, a welcome refuge for a drink and a bite before the long descent back to Hochmuth. A big, rewarding mountain day: about 13 km and over 1,000 m of climbing, high and exposed to the weather, on a good path.

josephineNote.en: A proper mountain day, but the most rewarding kind — share the gentle Mutkopf approach with the Mutspitze crowd, then peel off into the quiet of the Spronser lakes. Pause at the Oberkaserhütte for goulash and a cold beer or Radler — the air's thin and sharp up here. Settled weather, early start, layers.
josephineNote.it: Una vera giornata di montagna, ma della specie più appagante — condividi il dolce avvicinamento al Mutkopf con chi va alla Mutspitze, poi stacca verso la quiete dei laghi di Sopranes. Sosta all'Oberkaserhütte per un gulasch e una birra fredda o un Radler — quassù l'aria è sottile e frizzante. Tempo stabile, partenza presto, vestiti a strati.
josephineNote.de: Ein richtiger Bergtag, aber von der schönsten Sorte — teil dir den gemütlichen Anstieg zum Mutkopf mit den Mutspitze-Leuten und biege dann ab in die Stille der Spronser Seen. Kehr beim Oberkaserhütte ein, auf ein Gulasch und ein kaltes Bier oder Radler — hier oben ist die Luft dünn und frisch. Stabiles Wetter, früher Start, Schichten.

text.en: The Oberkaserhütte (≈2,130 m) is the place to refuel — a good goulash, and at this altitude the air is crisp enough that a cold beer or a Radler really hits the spot.
text.it: L'Oberkaserhütte (≈2.130 m) è il posto per ricaricare le energie — un buon gulasch, e a questa quota l'aria è così frizzante che una birra fredda o un Radler ci stanno proprio bene.
text.de: Das Oberkaserhütte (≈2.130 m) ist der Ort zum Auftanken — ein gutes Gulasch, und auf dieser Höhe ist die Luft so frisch, dass ein kaltes Bier oder ein Radler genau das Richtige sind.

text.en: The first Spronser lakes near the Oberkaserhütte are the reward — still, dark water in a stark stone basin, with the Texelgruppe peaks all around.
text.it: I primi laghi di Sopranes vicino all'Oberkaserhütte sono la ricompensa — acqua immobile e scura in un severo anfiteatro di roccia, con le cime del Gruppo di Tessa tutt'intorno.
text.de: Die ersten Spronser Seen beim Oberkaserhütte sind die Belohnung — stilles, dunkles Wasser in einem kargen Felskessel, ringsum die Gipfel der Texelgruppe.

text.en: Dogs can do this, but only fit, sure-footed ones — it's long, high and exposed in places, so keep them leashed on the airy sections. Plenty of water high up at the lakes and streams.
text.it: I cani possono farla, ma solo se in forma e dal passo sicuro — è lunga, alta ed esposta a tratti, quindi tienili al guinzaglio nei punti aerei. Tanta acqua in quota, ai laghi e ai ruscelli.
text.de: Hunde können das, aber nur fitte, trittsichere — es ist lang, hoch und stellenweise ausgesetzt, also halt sie an den luftigen Stellen an der Leine. Oben an den Seen und Bächen gibt es viel Wasser.

text.en: This is high, open ground (over 2,100 m) — go on a settled day, start early, and carry warm layers and sun protection; the weather can turn fast up here.
text.it: Qui si è in alta quota e all'aperto (oltre 2.100 m) — vai in una giornata stabile, parti presto e porta strati caldi e protezione solare; quassù il tempo può cambiare in fretta.
text.de: Hier oben ist es hoch und offen (über 2.100 m) — geh an einem stabilen Tag, starte früh und nimm warme Schichten und Sonnenschutz mit; das Wetter kann hier schnell umschlagen.

trails.name: Vellauer Felsenweg Loop (via Leiter Alm)
trails.tagline: A spectacular rock-balcony path above the Adige — airy, secured, and worth every step.
trails.dog_note: Dogs welcome — on the Hochmuth cable car the dog must wear a muzzle, and keep it close/leashed along the exposed Felsenweg.
highlights: The Vellauer Felsenweg — a rock balcony carved high above the Adige valley
Airy but well-built and cable-secured where it steepens: a very doable thrill
A gentle climb to the Leiter Alm to round it off (goulash time)
A short half-day loop from the Hochmuth cable car
Huge valley views for modest effort
trails.description: A short but spectacular loop that earns big views without a huge effort. From the Hochmuth cable car the path leads onto the Vellauer Felsenweg — a rock balcony carved across the cliffs high above the Adige valley. It's airy and exposed, yes, but well-built and secured with cables on the steeper steps, so anyone comfortable with heights can enjoy it at their own pace. Beyond the Felsenweg the route climbs gently to the Leiter Alm for a well-earned stop, then loops back to Hochmuth. About 5 km with 575 m of up-and-down — a big-mountain feel packed into a half-day.

josephineNote.en: Don't let the word 'Felsenweg' put you off — it's exposed but properly built and cabled where it matters, and the views are worth every step. Take your time on the airy bits, then reward yourself at the Leiter Alm. One of the best effort-to-wow ratios around.
josephineNote.it: Non lasciarti spaventare dalla parola 'Felsenweg' — è esposto ma ben costruito e attrezzato con cavi dove serve, e il panorama vale ogni passo. Prenditi il tuo tempo nei tratti aerei, poi premiati alla Leiter Alm. Uno dei migliori rapporti sforzo/meraviglia della zona.
josephineNote.de: Lass dich vom Wort 'Felsensteig' nicht abschrecken — er ist ausgesetzt, aber gut gebaut und dort, wo's drauf ankommt, mit Seilen gesichert, und die Aussicht ist jeden Schritt wert. Lass dir an den luftigen Stellen Zeit und belohn dich dann auf der Leiter Alm. Eines der besten Aufwand-Wow-Verhältnisse weit und breit.

text.en: The Felsenweg itself is the highlight — a narrow rock balcony with the Adige valley dropping away beneath your feet. Exposed, but cabled where it steepens; take it steadily and soak in the view.
text.it: Il Felsenweg stesso è il clou — uno stretto balcone di roccia con la valle dell'Adige che precipita sotto i tuoi piedi. Esposto, ma attrezzato con cavi dove si fa ripido; vai con calma e goditi il panorama.
text.de: Der Felsensteig selbst ist das Highlight — ein schmales Felsband mit dem Etschtal, das dir unter den Füßen abfällt. Ausgesetzt, aber dort gesichert, wo's steil wird; geh ruhig und genieß die Aussicht.

text.en: Round it off at the Leiter Alm — the goulash here is the reward you've earned.
text.it: Chiudi in bellezza alla Leiter Alm — il gulasch qui è la ricompensa che ti sei meritato.
text.de: Lass es auf der Leiter Alm ausklingen — das Gulasch hier ist die verdiente Belohnung.

text.en: Dogs are welcome — just two things: on the Hochmuth cable car your dog needs a muzzle, and keep it close and leashed along the exposed Felsenweg.
text.it: I cani sono benvenuti — solo due cose: sulla funivia dell'Hochmuth il cane deve avere la museruola, e tienilo vicino e al guinzaglio lungo il Felsenweg esposto.
text.de: Hunde sind willkommen — nur zwei Dinge: auf der Hochmuth-Seilbahn braucht dein Hund einen Maulkorb, und halt ihn am ausgesetzten Felsensteig nah und an der Leine.

trails.name: Longfall Waterfall Loop (from Dorf Tirol)
trails.tagline: A strenuous-then-shaded climb from the village to a forest waterfall and a fine family inn.
trails.dog_note: Dog-friendly forest walk with water along the way; leash near the inn and any grazing.
highlights: A strenuous-then-shaded climb from the village centre to a forest waterfall
The Spronser Bach waterfall beside the family-run Gasthaus Longfall
Genuinely good South Tyrolean food at the top — roast lamb, Kaiserschmarren, cakes
A breather (and an espresso) at the Tiroler Kreuz on the way up
Cool, green and watery — a fine warm-day hike
trails.description: A rewarding half-day straight from the centre of Dorf Tirol. It starts with a strenuous climb up through the village to the Tiroler Kreuz — a good spot to catch your breath over a drink — then follows a forest road steadily up into the shaded mouth of the Spronser valley to the Longfall, where the Spronser Bach tumbles in a waterfall beside a welcoming family inn. The loop returns to the village. About 8 km and 550 m of climb — earned, green and cool, with a proper alpine inn as its turning point.

josephineNote.en: Earn it on the climb through the village, fuel up with an espresso at the Tiroler Kreuz, then settle in at the Longfall for the lamb or a Kaiserschmarrn by the waterfall. Save room for a gelato when you're back down in the village.
josephineNote.it: Guadagnatela nella salita per il paese, fai il pieno con un espresso al Tiroler Kreuz, poi accomodati al Longfall per l'agnello o un Kaiserschmarren accanto alla cascata. Tieni un po' di spazio per un gelato una volta tornato in paese.
josephineNote.de: Verdien sie dir im Anstieg durchs Dorf, tank einen Espresso am Tiroler Kreuz und mach es dir dann beim Longfall gemütlich — Lamm oder Kaiserschmarrn am Wasserfall. Lass Platz für ein Eis, wenn du wieder im Dorf bist.

text.en: After the steep pull up through the village, the Tiroler Kreuz is the perfect breather — a refreshing drink and an espresso to fuel the forest climb to the Longfall.
text.it: Dopo lo strappo ripido su per il paese, il Tiroler Kreuz è la pausa perfetta — qualcosa di fresco da bere e un espresso per affrontare la salita nel bosco fino al Longfall.
text.de: Nach dem steilen Anstieg durchs Dorf ist das Tiroler Kreuz die perfekte Verschnaufpause — etwas Erfrischendes und ein Espresso für den Waldanstieg zum Longfall.

text.en: The family-run Gasthaus Longfall, by the Spronser Bach waterfall, is the highlight — genuinely good South Tyrolean cooking, with roast lamb and Kaiserschmarren the things to order, plus homemade cakes.
text.it: Il Gasthaus Longfall, a conduzione familiare, accanto alla cascata del Rio Sopranes, è il clou — cucina sudtirolese davvero buona, con l'agnello arrosto e il Kaiserschmarren da non perdere, e torte fatte in casa.
text.de: Das familiengeführte Gasthaus Longfall am Wasserfall des Spronser Bachs ist das Highlight — richtig gute Südtiroler Küche, mit Lammbraten und Kaiserschmarren als Klassikern, dazu hausgemachte Kuchen.

text.en: Your reward at the top is the Spronser Bach waterfall right by the Longfall inn — cool spray and welcome shade after the climb.
text.it: La ricompensa in cima è la cascata del Rio Sopranes proprio accanto al Longfall — spruzzi freschi e ombra gradita dopo la salita.
text.de: Die Belohnung oben ist der Wasserfall des Spronser Bachs direkt beim Longfall — kühle Gischt und willkommener Schatten nach dem Anstieg.

text.en: Back down in the village, finish with a gelato at Sammy's Eislabor — the Kefir flavour, made with regional milk, is a standout.
text.it: Tornato in paese, chiudi con un gelato da Sammy's Eislabor — il gusto Kefir, con latte regionale, è eccezionale.
text.de: Zurück im Dorf zum Abschluss ein Eis bei Sammy's Eislabor — die Sorte Kefir mit regionaler Milch ist ein Highlight.

trails.name: Dorf Tirol ↔ Schenna (via the castles)
trails.tagline: A village-to-village loop across the Passer to Schenna's two castles.
trails.dog_note: Dogs welcome — leash through the villages and orchards; water at the river crossing to cool off.
highlights: A village-to-village loop linking Dorf Tirol and Schenna across the Passer
Two castles on the Schenna side — Schloss Schenna and Schloss Thurn
A good lunch stop (pizza at Petermann) in the middle
Two river crossings and two climbs — a proper terrace-villages round
Best in spring or autumn, or the cool of the day in summer
trails.description: A village-to-village loop linking Dorf Tirol with neighbouring Schenna across the mouth of the Passeier. From the centre it drops steadily to the Passer, crosses the river by bridge, then climbs a good pitch up to the heart of Schenna, watched over by Schloss Schenna. From there it visits the castle of Thurn just above before descending back to the river and climbing home to Dorf Tirol. About 12 km with 640 m of up-and-down and two sun-exposed climbs — rewarding, but worth timing for a cooler part of the day.

josephineNote.en: A grand village-to-village round — down to the Passer, up to Schenna's castles, a pizza at Petermann, then home. It's a real up-and-down with sun on the climbs, so I'd keep it for spring or autumn, or in summer walk over in the cool morning and come back in the evening. Lovely with the dog.
josephineNote.it: Un bel giro di paese in paese — giù al Passirio, su ai castelli di Scena, una pizza da Petermann, poi a casa. È un saliscendi vero con sole sulle salite, quindi io la terrei per la primavera o l'autunno, oppure d'estate vai al mattino fresco e torna la sera. Bellissima col cane.
josephineNote.de: Eine schöne Runde von Dorf zu Dorf — hinunter zur Passer, hinauf zu Schennas Schlössern, eine Pizza bei Petermann, dann nach Hause. Ein echtes Auf und Ab mit Sonne an den Anstiegen, drum lieber im Frühling oder Herbst — oder im Sommer am kühlen Morgen hinüber und am Abend zurück. Herrlich mit Hund.

text.en: In Schenna, Restaurant Petermann is a lovely lunch stop — a really good pizza after the climb up from the river.
text.it: A Scena, il Restaurant Petermann è un'ottima sosta pranzo — una pizza davvero buona dopo la salita dal fiume.
text.de: In Schenna ist das Restaurant Petermann ein schöner Mittagsstopp — eine richtig gute Pizza nach dem Anstieg vom Fluss herauf.

text.en: Pick your moment: with two river crossings and two climbs in the sun, this one is best in spring or autumn — or, in summer, walk over in the cool of the morning and head back to Dorf Tirol in the evening.
text.it: Scegli il momento giusto: con due attraversamenti del fiume e due salite al sole, questa è meglio in primavera o autunno — oppure, d'estate, vai al mattino fresco e torna a Tirolo la sera.
text.de: Wähl den richtigen Moment: mit zwei Flussquerungen und zwei Anstiegen in der Sonne ist diese Runde im Frühling oder Herbst am schönsten — oder im Sommer am kühlen Morgen hinüber und am Abend zurück nach Dorf Tirol.

text.en: Two castles bookend the Schenna side — Schloss Schenna in the village centre and Schloss Thurn just above; both worth a look as you pass.
text.it: Due castelli incorniciano il versante di Scena — Castel Scena nel centro del paese e Castel Thurn poco sopra; entrambi meritano uno sguardo lungo il cammino.
text.de: Zwei Schlösser rahmen die Schenner Seite — Schloss Schenna im Dorfzentrum und Schloss Thurn knapp darüber; beide einen Blick wert im Vorbeigehen.

text.en: Dogs are welcome — keep them leashed through the villages and orchards, and there's water at the river crossing to cool off.
text.it: I cani sono benvenuti — tienili al guinzaglio nei paesi e nei frutteti, e all'attraversamento del fiume c'è acqua per rinfrescarsi.
text.de: Hunde sind willkommen — halt sie in den Dörfern und Obstwiesen an der Leine, und am Flussübergang gibt es Wasser zum Abkühlen.

trails.name: Dorf Tirol ↔ Riffian (Rifiano)
trails.tagline: A gentle village-to-village loop through the orchards to Riffian.
trails.dog_note: An easy, dog-friendly outing — water along the way, and both the Pircher pizzeria and Ungericht welcome dogs.
highlights: A gentle village-to-village loop to Riffian (Rifiano) and back
Friendly Ungericht in Kuens — with its warm-raspberry gelato — on the way
A historic pizzeria, Eisdiele Pircher, on the return
A resting viewpoint over Merano and its surroundings
Easy, sunny and very dog-friendly
trails.description: A pleasant village-to-village loop from Dorf Tirol to Riffian (Rifiano), the small village guarding the gateway to the Passeier valley. The route winds out through orchards and lanes — passing the friendly Ungericht in Kuens — to Riffian, then turns for home. On the way back it rewards you with a wonderful old pizzeria and a viewpoint over Merano before the gentle climb back into Dorf Tirol. About 8 km of easy, sunny walking with a little up-and-down.

josephineNote.en: One of the gentlest village rounds — orchards, a friendly stop at Ungericht, an easy stroll into Riffian, and on the way home a slice at the historic Pircher pizzeria with a Merano view to see you off. Bring the dog; everyone here welcomes them.
josephineNote.it: Uno dei giri di paese più tranquilli — frutteti, una sosta accogliente all'Ungericht, una passeggiata facile fino a Riffiano, e sulla via di casa una fetta alla storica pizzeria Pircher con la vista su Merano a salutarti. Porta il cane; qui lo accolgono tutti.
josephineNote.de: Eine der sanftesten Dorfrunden — Obstwiesen, eine freundliche Einkehr beim Ungericht, ein leichter Bummel nach Riffian und auf dem Heimweg ein Stück in der historischen Pizzeria Pircher mit Meran-Blick zum Abschied. Nimm den Hund mit; hier sind alle willkommen.

text.en: En route you pass Ungericht in Kuens — a friendly stop for a drink or a bite, with a tractor museum and that unforgettable warm-raspberry gelato (and they love dogs).
text.it: Lungo il percorso passi dall'Ungericht a Caines — una sosta accogliente per un drink o un boccone, con un museo dei trattori e quell'indimenticabile gelato ai lamponi caldi (e adorano i cani).
text.de: Unterwegs kommst du am Ungericht in Kuens vorbei — eine freundliche Einkehr für einen Drink oder einen Happen, mit Traktorenmuseum und dem unvergesslichen Eis mit warmen Himbeeren (und Hunde sind sehr willkommen).

text.en: On the way back, don't miss Pizzeria Eisdiele Pircher — a wonderful pizzeria-and-ice-cream parlour with a rich local history, and dog-friendly too.
text.it: Sulla via del ritorno, non perderti la Pizzeria Eisdiele Pircher — una splendida pizzeria-gelateria con una ricca storia locale, e accoglie anche i cani.
text.de: Auf dem Rückweg lass dir die Pizzeria Eisdiele Pircher nicht entgehen — eine wunderbare Pizzeria und Eisdiele mit reicher lokaler Geschichte, und hundefreundlich obendrein.

text.en: There's a resting spot and viewpoint on the way back to Dorf Tirol with a lovely outlook over Merano and its surroundings — a good place to pause.
text.it: Sulla via del ritorno verso Tirolo c'è un punto di sosta e belvedere con una bella vista su Merano e dintorni — un buon posto per fermarsi.
text.de: Auf dem Rückweg nach Dorf Tirol gibt es einen Rastplatz mit Aussicht und einem schönen Blick auf Meran und Umgebung — ein guter Ort für eine Pause.

text.en: An easy, dog-friendly outing — water along the way, and both the Pircher pizzeria and Ungericht welcome four-legged guests.
text.it: Un'uscita facile e adatta ai cani — acqua lungo il percorso, e sia la pizzeria Pircher sia l'Ungericht accolgono gli ospiti a quattro zampe.
text.de: Ein leichter, hundefreundlicher Ausflug — Wasser unterwegs, und sowohl die Pizzeria Pircher als auch das Ungericht freuen sich über Gäste auf vier Pfoten.

trails.name: Dorf Tirol ↔ Kuens (Kuens Waalweg)
trails.tagline: Forest, then the meditative Kuens Waalweg with water at your side the whole way.
trails.dog_note: A brilliant dog walk — water is close almost the whole way and your dog can drop into the stream to cool off and drink; the hosts at Ungericht love dogs.

trailhead_info.parking: Start in Dorf Tirol village (park in the centre).

highlights: A forest-and-water loop linking Dorf Tirol with neighbouring Kuens (Caines)
The meditative Kuens Waalweg — near-level, the channel always on your left
Cool, shaded forest road on the climb; water close by almost the whole way
A superb dog walk — the stream is reachable again and again
Lunch, a tractor museum and warm-raspberry gelato at Ungericht in Kuens
trails.description: A varied loop linking Dorf Tirol with its small neighbour Kuens (Caines). It sets off from the village and climbs into cool forest, following a forest road toward the Longfall, where you cross a bridge and pick up the Kuens Waalweg — a meditative, near-level path with the old irrigation channel running steadily on your left and water never far away. The Waalweg eases you down toward Kuens, passing Schloss Auer and the Johanneum, before the route turns back to Dorf Tirol and crosses the village from the other side. About 10 km with a real climb into the woods — shaded, watery and calm.

josephineNote.en: One of my calmest half-days — shade, the sound of water, and that flat, meditative stretch of Waalweg where you just breathe. Time it for lunch at Ungericht (the warm-raspberry gelato!), and bring the dog — there's water the whole way.
josephineNote.it: Una delle mie mezze giornate più tranquille — ombra, il suono dell'acqua e quel tratto piatto e meditativo del Waalweg dove respiri e basta. Falla coincidere col pranzo all'Ungericht (il gelato ai lamponi caldi!), e porta il cane — c'è acqua tutto il tempo.
josephineNote.de: Einer meiner ruhigsten halben Tage — Schatten, das Rauschen des Wassers und dieser flache, meditative Waalweg-Abschnitt, wo du einfach atmest. Plan ihn ums Mittagessen beim Ungericht (das Eis mit warmen Himbeeren!), und nimm den Hund mit — Wasser gibt's den ganzen Weg.

text.en: In Kuens, stop at Ungericht for lunch or a drink — and don't miss the warm-raspberry gelato ('lamponi caldi'), ice cream with hot raspberries, unforgettable. There's a tractor museum to visit too, and the hosts are wonderfully dog-friendly.
text.it: A Caines fermati all'Ungericht per pranzo o qualcosa da bere — e non perderti i 'lamponi caldi', gelato con lamponi caldi, indimenticabile. C'è anche un museo dei trattori da visitare, e i gestori sono splendidamente accoglienti con i cani.
text.de: In Kuens kehr beim Ungericht ein, zum Mittagessen oder auf einen Drink — und lass dir das Eis mit warmen Himbeeren ('lamponi caldi') nicht entgehen, unvergesslich. Es gibt auch ein Traktorenmuseum, und die Wirtsleute sind herrlich hundefreundlich.

text.en: A great one for dogs: water is with you almost the whole way — your dog can drop into the stream again and again to cool off and drink — and the team at Ungericht love four-legged guests.
text.it: Ottima per i cani: l'acqua ti accompagna quasi tutto il tempo — il tuo cane può entrare nel ruscello più volte per rinfrescarsi e bere — e all'Ungericht adorano gli ospiti a quattro zampe.
text.de: Ideal für Hunde: Wasser begleitet dich fast den ganzen Weg — dein Hund kann immer wieder in den Bach, zum Abkühlen und Trinken — und im Ungericht freut man sich über Gäste auf vier Pfoten.

trails.name: Bockerhütte via the Spronser Valley
trails.tagline: A classic climb up the Spronser valley to a welcoming family refuge at 1,700 m.
trails.dog_note: Water along the Spronser valley for the dog; it's a long mountain day, so come prepared.

trailhead_info.parking: Park on the right just before the Tiroler Kreuz, or take the village bus up to the Tiroler Kreuz.

highlights: A classic Spronser-valley climb to the Bockerhütte (1,700 m)
Shares its lower half with the Longfall waterfall loop
A welcoming family refuge in the Texelgruppe Nature Park
Hearty South Tyrolean food at the top (and a bed, if you push on)
A gateway to the high Tiroler Höhenweg
trails.description: A rewarding climb deep into the Spronser valley to one of the area's classic refuges. From the Tiroler Kreuz the path heads up past the Longfall waterfall — the lower half shared with the Longfall loop — then keeps climbing through forest and open alm to the Bockerhütte at 1,700 m, beautifully set in the Texelgruppe Nature Park. The hut, a Schnitzer-family classic, is the turnaround and the lunch stop before the long descent back. About 11 km with over 1,000 m of ascent — a proper mountain day on good paths, and a gateway to the high Tiroler Höhenweg.

josephineNote.en: A grand half-day up the Spronser valley — past the Longfall waterfall, then on and up to the Bockerhütte for lunch at 1,700 m. Park by the Tiroler Kreuz or take the bus up to save your legs. Settled weather and good shoes; it's a real climb, but the hut at the top is worth every metre.
josephineNote.it: Una bella mezza giornata su per la Val di Sopranes — oltre la cascata del Longfall, poi su fino alla Bockerhütte per pranzo a 1.700 m. Parcheggia al Tiroler Kreuz o prendi il bus per risparmiare le gambe. Tempo stabile e scarpe buone; è una salita vera, ma il rifugio in cima vale ogni metro.
josephineNote.de: Ein großer halber Tag durchs Spronser Tal — am Longfall-Wasserfall vorbei, dann hinauf zur Bockerhütte zum Mittagessen auf 1.700 m. Park beim Tiroler Kreuz oder nimm den Bus hinauf, das schont die Beine. Stabiles Wetter und gute Schuhe; es ist ein echter Anstieg, aber die Hütte oben ist jeden Meter wert.

text.en: The Bockerhütte (1,700 m) is the goal — a welcoming refuge run by the Schnitzer family, hearty South Tyrolean cooking and refreshing drinks, with an 'Echte Qualität am Berg'-certified kitchen. It's also the start of the Tiroler Höhenweg if you're plotting something bigger, with rooms and a dormitory for an overnight.
text.it: La Bockerhütte (1.700 m) è la meta — un rifugio accogliente gestito dalla famiglia Schnitzer, cucina sudtirolese sostanziosa e bevande fresche, con una cucina certificata 'Echte Qualität am Berg'. È anche il punto di partenza del Tiroler Höhenweg se hai in mente qualcosa di più grande, con camere e camerata per la notte.
text.de: Die Bockerhütte (1.700 m) ist das Ziel — eine gastliche Hütte der Familie Schnitzer, herzhafte Südtiroler Küche und erfrischende Getränke, mit 'Echte Qualität am Berg'-Zertifizierung. Sie ist außerdem Ausgangspunkt des Tiroler Höhenwegs, falls du Größeres planst, mit Zimmern und Lager für die Übernachtung.

text.en: You pass the family-run Gasthaus Longfall on the way up — good South Tyrolean food by the waterfall (roast lamb, Kaiserschmarren), a perfect midway stop.
text.it: Lungo la salita passi dal Gasthaus Longfall, a conduzione familiare — buona cucina sudtirolese accanto alla cascata (agnello arrosto, Kaiserschmarren), una sosta perfetta a metà strada.
text.de: Auf dem Weg hinauf kommst du am familiengeführten Gasthaus Longfall vorbei — gute Südtiroler Küche am Wasserfall (Lammbraten, Kaiserschmarren), ein perfekter Halt auf halbem Weg.

text.en: Start from the Tiroler Kreuz — park on the right just before it, or take the village bus up and skip the road walk; it saves the steep pull through Dorf Tirol that the Longfall loop begins with.
text.it: Parti dal Tiroler Kreuz — parcheggia sulla destra poco prima, oppure prendi il bus dal paese ed eviti il tratto su strada; ti risparmi la salita ripida attraverso Tirolo con cui inizia la variante Longfall.
text.de: Starte beim Tiroler Kreuz — parke rechts kurz davor, oder nimm den Dorfbus hinauf und spar dir den Straßenabschnitt; das erspart den steilen Anstieg durch Dorf Tirol, mit dem die Longfall-Runde beginnt.

text.en: This is a full mountain day — over 1,000 m of climb to 1,700 m on good paths through the Spronser valley. Go on a settled day with proper footwear and layers, and let the Bockerhütte be your lunch turnaround.
text.it: È una giornata di montagna vera — oltre 1.000 m di dislivello fino a 1.700 m su buoni sentieri nella Val di Sopranes. Vai in una giornata stabile con scarpe adatte e strati, e fai della Bockerhütte la tua meta-pranzo.
text.de: Das ist ein richtiger Bergtag — über 1.000 Höhenmeter bis 1.700 m auf guten Wegen durchs Spronser Tal. Geh an einem stabilen Tag mit festem Schuhwerk und Schichten, und mach die Bockerhütte zu deiner Mittagskehre.

trails.name: Mutspitze Traverse & Spronser Lakes (ridge loop)
trails.tagline: The grand tour — Mutspitze summit, the airy chained ridge, and the high Spronser lakes in one loop.
trails.dog_note: Not a dog route — the chained, exposed ridge isn't safe for them. For a dog day on this mountain, do the standard Mutspitze out-and-back instead (muzzle on the cable car).
highlights: The full Mutspitze traverse — summit, ridge and the Spronser lakes in one loop
An airy ridge crest secured with iron chains (T3) behind the summit
The high Spronser lake basin and the Oberkaserhütte (2,131 m)
Returns beneath the peak via Mutkopf and the cable car
A serious mountain day — 1,400 m of climb to 2,292 m
trails.description: The grand tour of the Mutspitze, and one of the finest mountain days above Merano. From the Hochmuth cable car the path climbs the now-familiar way to the Mutspitze summit at 2,292 m, then keeps going: behind the summit cross the route takes to the ridge toward the Taufenscharte, a rocky, airy crest with exposed steps secured by iron chains (graded T3 — for sure-footed mountain hikers with a head for heights). Beyond the scharte it drops into the high Spronser lake basin, passing the Oberkaserhütte by the Kasersee at 2,131 m, then loops back beneath the peak to Mutkopf and the cable car. About 14 km and 1,400 m of climb at altitude — a serious, spectacular outing.

josephineNote.en: This is the big one — the Mutspitze summit, then the wild ridge over to the Spronser lakes. The crest is exposed and chained in places, so it's for confident, sure-footed hikers on a settled day, not for dogs or nervous heads. But link the summit, the ridge and those lakes in one loop and there's little finer above Merano. Goulash and a cold one at the Oberkaserhütte before the long way home.
josephineNote.it: Questa è quella grande — la cima della Mutspitze, poi la cresta selvaggia fino ai laghi di Sopranes. Il filo è esposto e attrezzato con catene a tratti, quindi è per escursionisti sicuri e con la testa per l'esposizione, in una giornata stabile, non per cani o per chi soffre il vuoto. Ma unisci cima, cresta e quei laghi in un anello e c'è poco di più bello sopra Merano. Gulasch e una birra fredda all'Oberkaserhütte prima del lungo ritorno.
josephineNote.de: Das ist die große — der Mutspitz-Gipfel, dann der wilde Grat hinüber zu den Spronser Seen. Der Kamm ist ausgesetzt und stellenweise mit Ketten gesichert, also etwas für sichere, trittfeste Geher an einem stabilen Tag, nicht für Hunde oder schwindelige Köpfe. Aber verbind Gipfel, Grat und diese Seen in einer Runde, und es gibt wenig Schöneres über Meran. Gulasch und ein kühles Bier beim Oberkaserhütte vor dem langen Heimweg.

text.en: The crux is the ridge behind the Mutspitze summit, down to the Taufenscharte — rocky and airy, with a few exposed steps secured by iron chains (graded T3). It's well-built, but it's for sure-footed mountain hikers with a head for heights; take it steadily.
text.it: Il passaggio chiave è la cresta dietro la cima della Mutspitze, fino alla Taufenscharte — rocciosa e aerea, con alcuni passi esposti assicurati da catene di ferro (grado T3). È ben attrezzata, ma è per escursionisti dal passo sicuro e con la testa per l'esposizione; vai con calma.
text.de: Die Schlüsselstelle ist der Grat hinter dem Mutspitz-Gipfel hinab zur Taufenscharte — felsig und luftig, mit einigen ausgesetzten Stufen, die mit Eisenketten gesichert sind (T3). Gut gebaut, aber für trittsichere Bergwanderer mit Kopf für die Ausgesetztheit; geh ruhig.

text.en: From the Mutspitze summit (2,292 m) the panorama is immense — Merano and the Adige far below, the Texelgruppe all around, and the ridge ahead luring you on to the lakes.
text.it: Dalla cima della Mutspitze (2.292 m) il panorama è immenso — Merano e l'Adige in basso, il Gruppo di Tessa tutt'intorno, e la cresta davanti che ti invita verso i laghi.
text.de: Vom Mutspitz-Gipfel (2.292 m) ist das Panorama gewaltig — Meran und die Etsch tief unten, ringsum die Texelgruppe, und der Grat voraus, der dich zu den Seen lockt.

text.en: Down at the lakes, the Oberkaserhütte (≈2,130 m) by the Kasersee is the place to refuel — a good goulash, and at this altitude a cold beer or a Radler really hits the spot.
text.it: Giù ai laghi, l'Oberkaserhütte (≈2.130 m) accanto al Kasersee è il posto per ricaricarsi — un buon gulasch, e a questa quota una birra fredda o un Radler ci stanno proprio bene.
text.de: Unten an den Seen ist das Oberkaserhütte (≈2.130 m) am Kasersee der Ort zum Auftanken — ein gutes Gulasch, und auf dieser Höhe sind ein kaltes Bier oder ein Radler genau das Richtige.

text.en: High and committing: over 2,200 m, long, and exposed on the ridge — go only in settled weather, start early, and carry warm layers, water and sun protection.
text.it: Alta e impegnativa: oltre 2.200 m, lunga ed esposta sulla cresta — vai solo con tempo stabile, parti presto e porta strati caldi, acqua e protezione solare.
text.de: Hoch und fordernd: über 2.200 m, lang und am Grat ausgesetzt — nur bei stabilem Wetter, früh starten und warme Schichten, Wasser und Sonnenschutz mitnehmen.

text.en: Not a dog route — the chained, exposed ridge isn't safe for them. For a dog day on the same mountain, do the standard Mutspitze out-and-back instead (with a muzzle on the cable car).
text.it: Non è un percorso per cani — la cresta esposta e attrezzata con catene non è sicura per loro. Per una giornata col cane sulla stessa montagna, fai piuttosto la Mutspitze classica andata e ritorno (con la museruola in funivia).
text.de: Keine Hunderoute — der gesicherte, ausgesetzte Grat ist für sie nicht sicher. Für einen Hundetag am selben Berg lieber die normale Mutspitze hin und zurück (mit Maulkorb in der Seilbahn).

trails.name: Spronser Seen Circuit (the 10 lakes)
trails.tagline: The complete round of South Tyrol's highest lake district — a true gem, and a big day.
trails.dog_note: Endless hydration for a fit, sure-footed dog — lakes and streams almost the whole way. But it's long, high and exposed at the passes; only for a strong dog on a settled day.
highlights: The complete round of the Spronser lakes — South Tyrol's highest lake district
Ten lakes between ~2,120 and 2,590 m, in every shade of green and blue
The high Forcella Spronser beneath the Spronser Rötelspitze (Cima Rosa)
Refuges and alms to refuel — Oberkaserhütte, Hochganghaus, Leiter Alm
A serious 18 km / 1,780 m mountain day — a true gem of the area
trails.description: The full circuit of the Spronser See, and one of the great mountain days of the whole region. From the Hochmuth cable car the route climbs into the high Spronser valley and makes the complete round of the lake district — the highest lakes in South Tyrol, ten of them strung between roughly 2,120 and 2,590 m. It works up to the Forcella Spronser beneath the Spronser Rötelspitze (Cima Rosa) — the peak left for another day — for a grand overview of the whole basin, then descends past the Hochganghaus and the Leiter Alm back to the cable car. About 18 km and 1,780 m of climb at altitude, with steep passes and exposure: a hard day, and an absolute gem.

josephineNote.en: If you do one big day above Merano, make it this — the whole necklace of the Spronser lakes, up to the Forcella under the Rötelspitze and round. It's long, high and exposed at the passes, so go fit, start early, and only in settled weather; string the huts together for your breaks. Endless water for the dog, if it's a strong one. Unforgettable.
josephineNote.it: Se fai una sola grande giornata sopra Merano, fai questa — l'intera collana dei laghi di Sopranes, su alla Forcella sotto la Rötelspitze e in giro. È lunga, alta ed esposta ai valichi, quindi vai in forma, parti presto e solo con tempo stabile; usa i rifugi per le soste. Acqua infinita per il cane, se è robusto. Indimenticabile.
josephineNote.de: Wenn du einen großen Tag über Meran machst, dann diesen — die ganze Kette der Spronser Seen, hinauf zur Forcella unter der Rötelspitze und herum. Lang, hoch und an den Scharten ausgesetzt, also fit losgehen, früh starten und nur bei stabilem Wetter; reih die Hütten für die Pausen aneinander. Endlos Wasser für den Hund, wenn er stark ist. Unvergesslich.

pois.name: Forcella Spronser (≈2,490 m, below Cima Rosa)

text.en: This is the full round of the Spronser See — the highest lake district in South Tyrol, ten lakes strung between roughly 2,120 and 2,590 m. From the high Forcella Spronser the whole basin opens below, the lakes shimmering in every shade of green and blue (the very best view is from the Spronser Rötelspitze just above, if you've legs left).
text.it: Questo è il giro completo dei laghi di Sopranes — il distretto lacustre più alto dell'Alto Adige, dieci laghi tra circa 2.120 e 2.590 m. Dall'alta Forcella di Sopranes l'intera conca si apre sotto di te, i laghi che brillano in ogni sfumatura di verde e blu (la vista migliore è dalla Cima Rosa poco sopra, se hai ancora gambe).
text.de: Das ist die komplette Runde der Spronser Seen — das höchste Seengebiet Südtirols, zehn Seen zwischen rund 2.120 und 2.590 m. Von der hohen Spronser Scharte öffnet sich der ganze Kessel unter dir, die Seen schimmern in allen Grün- und Blautönen (der allerbeste Blick ist von der Spronser Rötelspitze knapp darüber, wenn die Beine noch wollen).

text.en: The Oberkaserhütte by the Kasersee (≈2,130 m) is the refuge of the circuit — goulash, cold drinks, and a roof if the weather turns; a fine place to break the long loop.
text.it: L'Oberkaserhütte accanto al Kasersee (≈2.130 m) è il rifugio del giro — gulasch, bevande fredde e un tetto se il tempo cambia; un bel posto per spezzare il lungo anello.
text.de: Das Oberkaserhütte am Kasersee (≈2.130 m) ist die Hütte der Runde — Gulasch, kalte Getränke und ein Dach, falls das Wetter kippt; ein guter Ort, um die lange Schleife zu unterbrechen.

text.en: For a fit, sure-footed dog this is paradise for hydration — lakes and streams almost the whole way to drink and cool off. But it's long, high and exposed at the passes, so save it for a strong dog on a settled day.
text.it: Per un cane in forma e dal passo sicuro è il paradiso dell'idratazione — laghi e ruscelli quasi tutto il tempo per bere e rinfrescarsi. Ma è lunga, alta ed esposta ai valichi, quindi tienila per un cane robusto e una giornata stabile.
text.de: Für einen fitten, trittsicheren Hund ist das ein Paradies zum Trinken — Seen und Bäche fast den ganzen Weg zum Trinken und Abkühlen. Aber lang, hoch und an den Scharten ausgesetzt, also nur für einen starken Hund an einem stabilen Tag.

text.en: Treat this as a big mountain day — about 18 km and 1,780 m of climb to 2,486 m, with steep scharten and a real need for stamina and a head for heights. Use the pit stops well: the Leiter Alm and Hochganghaus on the way, the Oberkaserhütte at the lakes. Settled weather, early start, full kit.
text.it: Trattala come una grande giornata di montagna — circa 18 km e 1.780 m di dislivello fino a 2.486 m, con valichi ripidi e una vera necessità di resistenza e testa per l'esposizione. Sfrutta bene le soste: Leiter Alm e Hochganghaus lungo il cammino, l'Oberkaserhütte ai laghi. Tempo stabile, partenza presto, attrezzatura completa.
text.de: Nimm das als großen Bergtag — rund 18 km und 1.780 Höhenmeter bis 2.486 m, mit steilen Scharten und echtem Bedarf an Ausdauer und Kopf für die Höhe. Nutz die Stützpunkte gut: Leiter Alm und Hochganghaus unterwegs, das Oberkaserhütte an den Seen. Stabiles Wetter, früher Start, volle Ausrüstung.

trails.name: Spronser Rötelspitze (Cima Rosa)
trails.tagline: The great summit above the Spronser lakes — a bird's-eye view over the whole basin.
trails.dog_note: Water at the lakes for a fit, sure-footed dog, but it's long and high and the summit block needs a hand here and there — consider turning around below the final rocks.
highlights: The Spronser Rötelspitze / Cima Rosa (2,625 m) — the great viewpoint of the Texelgruppe
A bird's-eye panorama over the whole Spronser lake district
Climbs the high plateau via the Hochgangscharte (2,441 m)
Mostly hiking, just an occasional hand near the summit
A long, high, scenically varied mountain day — and rarely crowded
trails.description: The summit version of the Spronser lakes — and arguably the finest viewpoint in the whole Texelgruppe. From the Hochmuth cable car the route climbs into the high Spronser plateau, threading past the lakes, and works up to the Hochgangscharte (2,441 m) before the final pull to the Spronser Rötelspitze (Cima Rosa, 2,625 m). The peak sits at the southern edge of the lake basin with nothing higher to the south or east, so the panorama — and the bird's-eye view down onto the lakes shimmering in green and blue — is magnificent. It's mostly walking, with just the odd use of a hand near the top, but it's a long, high day: settled weather and good stamina required.

josephineNote.en: If the Spronser circuit gives you the lakes, the Rötelspitze gives you the view of them — from the top you look straight down onto the whole shimmering necklace. It's long and high, with a touch of hands-on rock at the summit, so go fit, start early and only on a settled day. The least-crowded big summit around here, and the most rewarding panorama.
josephineNote.it: Se il giro dei laghi di Sopranes ti regala i laghi, la Rötelspitze ti regala la vista su di essi — dalla cima guardi dritto giù sull'intera collana scintillante. È lunga e alta, con un po' di roccia da affrontare con le mani in vetta, quindi vai in forma, parti presto e solo con tempo stabile. La cima grande meno affollata della zona, e il panorama più appagante.
josephineNote.de: Wenn dir die Spronser-Runde die Seen schenkt, schenkt dir die Rötelspitze den Blick auf sie — vom Gipfel schaust du direkt hinab auf die ganze glitzernde Kette. Lang und hoch, mit etwas Handarbeit am Gipfel, also fit, früh und nur bei stabilem Wetter. Der am wenigsten überlaufene große Gipfel hier — und das lohnendste Panorama.

text.en: From the Spronser Rötelspitze (2,625 m) the panorama is the prize — nothing higher to the south or east, and a bird's-eye view straight down onto the whole Spronser lake basin shimmering in green and blue.
text.it: Dalla Spronser Rötelspitze (2.625 m) il panorama è il premio — niente di più alto a sud o a est, e una vista a volo d'uccello dritta sull'intera conca dei laghi di Sopranes che brillano di verde e blu.
text.de: Von der Spronser Rötelspitze (2.625 m) ist das Panorama der Lohn — nichts Höheres im Süden oder Osten, und ein Blick aus der Vogelperspektive direkt hinab auf den ganzen Spronser Seenkessel, der grün und blau schimmert.

text.en: The route is mostly hiking, climbing the high plateau to the Hochgangscharte (2,441 m) and on to the peak — only near the top do you need the odd hand on rock. It's long and high though: go on a settled day, start early, and carry layers, water and sun protection.
text.it: Il percorso è per lo più escursionistico, sale l'altopiano fino alla Hochgangscharte (2.441 m) e poi in vetta — solo vicino alla cima serve qualche presa di mano sulla roccia. È però lunga e alta: vai con tempo stabile, parti presto e porta strati, acqua e protezione solare.
text.de: Die Route ist überwiegend Wandern, hinauf aufs Hochplateau zur Hochgangscharte (2.441 m) und weiter zum Gipfel — nur nahe der Spitze braucht es ab und zu eine Hand am Fels. Sie ist aber lang und hoch: an einem stabilen Tag gehen, früh starten und Schichten, Wasser und Sonnenschutz mitnehmen.

text.en: Plenty of water at the lakes for a fit, sure-footed dog — but it's a big, high day and the summit block needs a hand here and there, so think about turning around below the final rocks.
text.it: Tanta acqua ai laghi per un cane in forma e dal passo sicuro — ma è una giornata lunga e alta e la cima richiede qualche presa di mano, quindi valuta di fermarti sotto le rocce finali.
text.de: Viel Wasser an den Seen für einen fitten, trittsicheren Hund — aber es ist ein großer, hoher Tag und der Gipfelaufbau braucht hier und da eine Hand, also überleg, unter den letzten Felsen umzukehren.

trails.name: Apfelweg (Apple Trail)
trails.tagline: An easy, educational orchard loop — magic at apple blossom and harvest.
trails.dog_note: Easy leash walk through orchards; mind the grazing and farm plots.
highlights: An easy circular family loop through Dorf Tirol's apple orchards
Info stations turn the walk into a fun apple-growing lesson
Climbs past Schloss Auer, with the Doss viewpoint over Merano
Glorious at apple blossom in spring and at harvest in autumn
trails.description: An easy, educational loop through the apple orchards on the sunny terrace of Dorf Tirol. Information stations along the way tell the story of South Tyrol's apples and the area's history; the path climbs gently past Schloss Auer and takes in the 'Doss' viewpoint over the Merano basin. It's especially magical at apple blossom in spring and when the ripe fruit glows red and yellow in autumn — a lovely, gentle outing for families.

josephineNote.en: My pick for a relaxed family morning — flat, full of apple trees, and a little lesson at every stop. Go at blossom time or harvest, and finish with a gelato at Sammy's down in the village.
josephineNote.it: La mia scelta per una mattinata in famiglia — in piano, piena di meli e con una piccola lezione a ogni tappa. Vai alla fioritura o alla raccolta, e chiudi con un gelato da Sammy's in paese.
josephineNote.de: Mein Tipp für einen entspannten Familienvormittag — flach, voller Apfelbäume und an jeder Station eine kleine Lektion. Geh zur Blüte oder Ernte und schließ mit einem Eis bei Sammy's im Dorf ab.

text.en: An easy, well-marked loop with info stations — a real winner with kids, and barely any climb. Best at apple blossom (spring) or harvest (autumn).
text.it: Un anello facile e ben segnalato con stazioni informative — un successo con i bambini, e quasi senza salita. Meglio alla fioritura (primavera) o alla raccolta (autunno).
text.de: Eine leichte, gut markierte Runde mit Infostationen — ein Hit mit Kindern und kaum Anstieg. Am schönsten zur Apfelblüte (Frühling) oder Ernte (Herbst).

text.en: Back in the village, reward the little ones (and yourself) with a gelato at Sammy's Eislabor — the Kefir flavour is a standout.
text.it: Tornati in paese, premia i più piccoli (e te stesso) con un gelato da Sammy's Eislabor — il gusto Kefir è eccezionale.
text.de: Zurück im Dorf belohn die Kleinen (und dich) mit einem Eis bei Sammy's Eislabor — die Sorte Kefir ist ein Highlight.

trails.name: Tappeinerweg (Tappeiner Promenade)
trails.tagline: One of Europe's loveliest high promenades — Mediterranean planting and the best view of Merano.
trails.dog_note: Easy, mostly level leash walk on a gravel promenade; pram- and wheelchair-friendly from Gratsch.
highlights: One of Europe's loveliest high promenades — laid out in 1892 by Dr. Franz Tappeiner
Mediterranean and exotic planting — cork oaks, olives, eucalyptus, magnolias
A near-level descent from the Dorf Tirol side into Merano's belle-époque spa quarter
Ends among the Kurhaus, Wandelhalle and the Sisi statue — and the best view over Merano
Easy, gravelled and shaded — drinking fountains along the way
trails.description: A classic among Merano's walks, laid out in 1892 by Dr. Franz Tappeiner on the sunny Küchelberg. This line runs the promenade as a near-level, gently descending stroll from the Dorf Tirol side down into Merano's belle-époque spa quarter — past the Tappeiner memorial and into the heart of town by the Kurhaus, the Wandelhalle and the statue of Empress 'Sisi'. All the way it offers what many call the finest view over Merano and the Adige basin, with a remarkable mix of native, Mediterranean and exotic planting. Easy and shaded, with drinking fountains en route.

josephineNote.en: A grand view for almost no effort — stroll the Tappeiner down off the Küchelberg into Merano, finishing among the Kurhaus and the palms. Lovely as an evening walk in summer (the path's lit till midnight), and there are fountains to refill. Bus 236 back up, or pair it with the Tiroler Weg.
josephineNote.it: Una vista grandiosa con pochissima fatica — percorri il Tappeiner giù dal Küchelberg fino a Merano, finendo tra il Kurhaus e le palme. Bellissimo come passeggiata serale d'estate (il sentiero è illuminato fino a mezzanotte), e ci sono fontane per riempire la borraccia. Bus 236 per risalire, o abbinalo al Tiroler Weg.
josephineNote.de: Große Aussicht für fast keine Mühe — schlender den Tappeiner vom Küchelberg hinab nach Meran, mit Ausklang zwischen Kurhaus und Palmen. Schön als Abendspaziergang im Sommer (der Weg ist bis Mitternacht beleuchtet), und es gibt Brunnen zum Nachfüllen. Bus 236 zurück, oder kombiniert mit dem Tiroler Weg.

text.en: The promenade gives what many call the finest view over Merano, its rooftops and the Adige basin — and the exotic planting makes it feel like a Mediterranean garden walk.
text.it: La promenade regala quella che molti considerano la vista più bella su Merano, i suoi tetti e la conca dell'Adige — e le piante esotiche la fanno sembrare una passeggiata in un giardino mediterraneo.
text.de: Die Promenade bietet, was viele für den schönsten Blick über Meran, seine Dächer und das Etschbecken halten — und die exotische Bepflanzung lässt sie wie einen Spaziergang durch einen mediterranen Garten wirken.

text.en: Go early on a hot day, or stroll it in the evening — in summer the Tappeinerweg is lit until midnight, and drinking fountains run from spring to autumn. Bus 236 stops at 'Tappeinerweg'.
text.it: Vai presto in una giornata calda, o passeggia di sera — d'estate il Tappeinerweg è illuminato fino a mezzanotte, e le fontanelle funzionano dalla primavera all'autunno. Il bus 236 ferma a 'Tappeinerweg'.
text.de: Geh an heißen Tagen früh, oder schlender abends — im Sommer ist der Tappeinerweg bis Mitternacht beleuchtet, und die Trinkbrunnen laufen von Frühling bis Herbst. Bus 236 hält bei 'Tappeinerweg'.

text.en: The Merano end is a belle-époque finale — the Kurhaus, the cast-iron Wandelhalle and the Sisi statue in Elisabeth Park, the legacy of the spa town's golden age.
text.it: Il finale verso Merano è belle époque — il Kurhaus, la Wandelhalle in ghisa e la statua di Sissi nel Parco Elisabetta, l'eredità dell'età d'oro della città termale.
text.de: Das Meraner Ende ist ein Belle-Époque-Finale — das Kurhaus, die gusseiserne Wandelhalle und die Sisi-Statue im Elisabethpark, das Erbe der Glanzzeit der Kurstadt.

trails.name: Weinweg (Wine Trail)
trails.tagline: A short themed loop through the vineyards above Merano.
trails.dog_note: Easy leash loop through vineyards; keep to the path among the vines.
highlights: A short, easy themed loop on the trail of winegrowing in Dorf Tirol
Info points on wine, viticulture and local history among the vines
Views over Merano, the surrounding mountains and the Tirolo castles
Joins the Falknerpromenade; can branch to the Brunnenburg
trails.description: A short, leisurely themed walk through the vineyards on the sunny terrace above Merano, with information points telling the story of wine and winegrowing in Dorf Tirol. The path winds gently among the vines — green in summer, gold in autumn — with views over the town, the mountains and the castles of Tirolo, before joining the Falknerpromenade toward the 'Doss'. An easy branch onto the Brunnenburgsteig adds the Brunnenburg and its farming museum.

josephineNote.en: A gentle vineyard wander with a glass of context at every info point. Short and sweet — and it threads into the same vineyards as my Falkner Promenade loop, so you can easily make a longer round of it.
josephineNote.it: Una passeggiata tranquilla tra i vigneti con un sorso di contesto a ogni punto informativo. Corta e piacevole — e si intreccia con gli stessi vigneti del mio giro della Falknerpromenade, così puoi farne facilmente un anello più lungo.
josephineNote.de: Ein sanfter Weinbergbummel mit einem Schluck Hintergrund an jeder Infotafel. Kurz und schön — und er verläuft durch dieselben Weinberge wie meine Falknerpromenade-Runde, sodass du leicht eine längere Runde daraus machst.

text.en: Short on its own (~2 km), but it joins the Falknerpromenade — link it with the vineyard loop for a longer, view-filled round, or branch to the Brunnenburg farming museum.
text.it: Corto da solo (~2 km), ma si unisce alla Falknerpromenade — collegalo all'anello dei vigneti per un giro più lungo e panoramico, o devia al museo agricolo del Brunnenburg.
text.de: Allein kurz (~2 km), aber er trifft auf die Falknerpromenade — verbinde ihn mit der Weinberg-Runde für eine längere, aussichtsreiche Runde, oder zweig zum Brunnenburg-Landwirtschaftsmuseum ab.

text.en: Don't miss the 'Doss' viewpoint on the Schlossweg — a lovely outlook over the Merano basin, the Adige and the Vinschgau, with Tyrol Castle, Brunnenburg and St. Peter's church all in the frame.
text.it: Non perderti il belvedere 'Doss' sullo Schlossweg — una bella vista sulla conca di Merano, l'Adige e la Val Venosta, con Castel Tirolo, il Brunnenburg e la chiesa di San Pietro nell'inquadratura.
text.de: Verpass nicht den Aussichtspunkt 'Doss' am Schlossweg — ein schöner Blick über das Meraner Becken, die Etsch und den Vinschgau, mit Schloss Tirol, dem Brunnenburg und der St.-Peter-Kirche im Bild.

text.en: Burglehen Park is a great family stop — orchard views and a playground, complete with 'Jakob', a steel horse by South Tyrolean artist Franz Messner.
text.it: Il Burglehen Park è un'ottima sosta in famiglia — vista sui frutteti e un parco giochi, con 'Jakob', un cavallo d'acciaio dell'artista altoatesino Franz Messner.
text.de: Der Burglehen Park ist ein toller Familienstopp — Blick auf die Obstwiesen und ein Spielplatz, samt 'Jakob', einem Stahlpferd des Südtiroler Künstlers Franz Messner.

trails.name: Fitnessweg (Fitness Trail)
trails.tagline: A forest exercise loop on the Hochmuth slope, above the Tiroler Kreuz.
trails.dog_note: Shaded forest loop, easy for dogs on a leash.
highlights: A marked gymnastics-and-walking trail through the Schlosswald forest
Fitness stations with exercise instructions along the way
Starts just above the Tiroler Kreuz, leading to the Farmerkreuz
Cool and shaded — a good warm-weather workout close to the village
trails.description: A marked fitness-and-walking trail winding through the forest on the slopes of Monte Muta above Dorf Tirol. It starts just above the Tiroler Kreuz and runs through the shaded Schlosswald to the Farmerkreuz, with fitness stations and exercise instructions dotted along the way. Cool, green and close to the village — a pleasant workout or an easy woodland stroll on a warm day.

josephineNote.en: A shady forest loop with workout stations — handy if you fancy a stretch-and-walk rather than a summit. It starts right by the Tiroler Kreuz, the same launch point as the Longfall and Bockerhütte walks.
josephineNote.it: Un anello ombroso nel bosco con stazioni per esercizi — comodo se hai voglia di muoverti senza puntare a una cima. Parte proprio dal Tiroler Kreuz, lo stesso punto di partenza delle escursioni al Longfall e alla Bockerhütte.
josephineNote.de: Eine schattige Waldrunde mit Übungsstationen — praktisch, wenn dir nach Bewegung statt Gipfel ist. Sie startet direkt beim Tiroler Kreuz, demselben Ausgangspunkt wie die Longfall- und Bockerhütte-Touren.

text.en: Start just above the Tiroler Kreuz (parking or the village bus) — the same trailhead as the Longfall and Bockerhütte walks. Stations with exercises line the forest loop to the Farmerkreuz.
text.it: Parti poco sopra il Tiroler Kreuz (parcheggio o bus del paese) — lo stesso punto di partenza delle escursioni al Longfall e alla Bockerhütte. Lungo l'anello nel bosco fino al Farmerkreuz ci sono stazioni con esercizi.
text.de: Starte knapp oberhalb des Tiroler Kreuz (Parkplatz oder Dorfbus) — derselbe Ausgangspunkt wie die Longfall- und Bockerhütte-Touren. Entlang der Waldrunde zum Farmerkreuz gibt es Übungsstationen.

trails.name: Hike to the Mutkopf
trails.tagline: The walk-up to the panoramic Mutkopf inn below the Mutspitze — no cable car.
trails.dog_note: Dog-friendly forest climb (no cable car on the way up); inns en route and a long day, so come prepared.
highlights: The walk-up to the Mutkopf inn (~1,664 m) below the Mutspitze — no cable car
A forest climb from the village past the Talbauer and Hochmuth
Big balcony views over the Merano basin from the Mutkopf
Inns to refuel — Talbauer, Hochmuth, Berggasthaus Mutkopf
A solid 1,070 m mountain day, all on good paths
trails.description: The walk-up to the Mutkopf — the panoramic shoulder and mountain inn (Berggasthaus Mutkopf, ~1,664 m) that sits just below the Mutspitze. Instead of taking the Hochmuth cable car, this loop climbs the whole way from Dorf Tirol through forest, past the Gasthof Talbauer and the Hochmuth, before the final pull to the Mutkopf and its wide views over the Merano basin. About 10 km and a solid 1,070 m of climb — a proper day, but all on good paths, with inns to break it.

josephineNote.en: If you'd rather earn the Mutkopf than ride the cable car, this is the way — a long, satisfying forest climb from the village with inns to pace you. Coffee at the Talbauer or Hochmuth, lunch at the Mutkopf, and the same big balcony view the Mutspitze crowd gets. Gelato at Sammy's when you're back down.
josephineNote.it: Se preferisci guadagnarti il Mutkopf invece di prendere la funivia, è questa la via — una lunga e soddisfacente salita nel bosco dal paese, con locande per fare tappa. Caffè al Talbauer o all'Hochmuth, pranzo al Mutkopf, e la stessa grande vista a balcone di chi va alla Mutspitze. Gelato da Sammy's al ritorno.
josephineNote.de: Wenn du dir den Mutkopf lieber verdienst, statt die Seilbahn zu nehmen, ist das der Weg — ein langer, schöner Waldanstieg vom Dorf, mit Einkehrmöglichkeiten zum Verschnaufen. Kaffee beim Talbauer oder Hochmuth, Mittagessen am Mutkopf, und derselbe große Balkonblick wie für die Mutspitze-Leute. Eis bei Sammy's, wenn du zurück bist.

text.en: Lunch at the Berggasthaus Mutkopf (~1,664 m) with the Merano basin spread out below — the same welcoming stop the Mutspitze hikers use.
text.it: Pranzo al Berggasthaus Mutkopf (~1.664 m) con la conca di Merano distesa sotto — la stessa accogliente sosta che usano gli escursionisti della Mutspitze.
text.de: Mittagessen im Berggasthaus Mutkopf (~1.664 m) mit dem Meraner Becken unter dir — dieselbe gastliche Einkehr, die auch die Mutspitze-Geher nutzen.

text.en: This is the on-foot alternative to the Hochmuth cable car — about 1,070 m of forest climb from the village. Break it at the Talbauer or Hochmuth, and from the Mutkopf you can press on to the Mutspitze summit if you've the legs.
text.it: È l'alternativa a piedi alla funivia dell'Hochmuth — circa 1.070 m di salita nel bosco dal paese. Fai tappa al Talbauer o all'Hochmuth, e dal Mutkopf puoi proseguire fino alla cima della Mutspitze se hai gambe.
text.de: Das ist die Fußvariante zur Hochmuth-Seilbahn — rund 1.070 Höhenmeter Waldanstieg vom Dorf. Kehr beim Talbauer oder Hochmuth ein, und vom Mutkopf kannst du weiter zur Mutspitze, wenn die Beine wollen.

text.en: Back down in the village, finish with a gelato at Sammy's Eislabor — the Kefir flavour is a standout.
text.it: Tornato in paese, chiudi con un gelato da Sammy's Eislabor — il gusto Kefir è eccezionale.
text.de: Zurück im Dorf zum Abschluss ein Eis bei Sammy's Eislabor — die Sorte Kefir ist ein Highlight.

trails.name: Dorf Tirol Culture Trail (Kulturweg)
trails.tagline: The village's castles, church and ice-age earth pyramids in one easy loop.
trails.dog_note: Easy cultural loop on good paths; leash near the castles, farms and the village.
highlights: Dorf Tirol's Kulturweg — its castles, church and earth pyramids in one loop
Schloss Tirol, the historically most important castle in the whole of Tyrol
The eerie earth pyramids — spires of ice-age moraine sculpted by erosion
The Knappenloch tunnel, Schloss Thurnstein and the old St. Peter parish church
A relaxed family round of history, with views over the Merano basin
trails.description: The Kulturweg is Dorf Tirol's culture trail — the loop for history-lovers, linking the village's great landmarks in one easy round. From the piazza in the centre it follows the Schlossweg through the Knappenloch, the old tunnel hewn before Schloss Tirol — the historically most important castle in all of Tyrol, seat of the Counts who gave the land its name. Past the castle it climbs by the earth pyramids, eerie spires of ice-age moraine sculpted by rain and erosion, then turns down past the Ötzbauer farms (the Vellau direction) and across to Schloss Thurnstein, before climbing home by the old St. Peter parish church and Schloss Tirol. About 7 km, with ~340 m of gentle up-and-down — culture, castles and views in a half-day.

josephineNote.en: My favourite way to read the village's history in an afternoon — through the Knappenloch tunnel, up by the strange earth pyramids, over to Thurnstein and home past St. Peter and Schloss Tirol. Stop for a Kaiserschmarrn at Schloss Thurnstein, and pause at the bench by St. Peter for the Adige view.
josephineNote.it: Il mio modo preferito di leggere la storia del paese in un pomeriggio — attraverso il tunnel del Knappenloch, su accanto alle strane piramidi di terra, fino al Thurnstein e a casa passando per San Pietro e Castel Tirolo. Fermati per un Kaiserschmarren a Schloss Thurnstein, e sosta sulla panchina vicino a San Pietro per la vista sull'Adige.
josephineNote.de: Meine liebste Art, die Dorfgeschichte an einem Nachmittag zu lesen — durch den Knappenloch-Tunnel, hinauf an den seltsamen Erdpyramiden vorbei, hinüber zum Thurnstein und heim an St. Peter und Schloss Tirol vorbei. Kehr für einen Kaiserschmarrn beim Schloss Thurnstein ein und halt an der Bank bei St. Peter für den Etschblick.

text.en: Schloss Tirol is the headline — the historically most important castle in the whole of Tyrol, seat of the Counts who gave the land its name; today it holds South Tyrol's museum of history.
text.it: Castel Tirolo è il pezzo forte — il castello storicamente più importante di tutto il Tirolo, sede dei Conti che diedero il nome alla regione; oggi ospita il museo storico dell'Alto Adige.
text.de: Schloss Tirol ist das Highlight — die historisch bedeutendste Burg ganz Tirols, Sitz der Grafen, die dem Land den Namen gaben; heute beherbergt es das Südtiroler Landesmuseum für Geschichte.

text.en: Don't rush past the earth pyramids — eerie spires of ice-age moraine, slowly sculpted by rain and erosion; one of the area's odd natural wonders.
text.it: Non passare di fretta accanto alle piramidi di terra — inquietanti guglie di morena dell'era glaciale, modellate lentamente da pioggia ed erosione; una delle bizzarre meraviglie naturali della zona.
text.de: Eil nicht an den Erdpyramiden vorbei — unheimliche Türme aus eiszeitlicher Moräne, langsam von Regen und Erosion geformt; eines der seltsamen Naturwunder der Gegend.

text.en: Just below, Schloss Thurnstein does a sensational Kaiserschmarrn — the perfect reward along the way.
text.it: Poco più in basso, Schloss Thurnstein prepara un Kaiserschmarrn sensazionale — la ricompensa perfetta lungo il cammino.
text.de: Kurz darunter macht Schloss Thurnstein einen sensationellen Kaiserschmarrn — die perfekte Belohnung unterwegs.

text.en: Just past the church of St. Peter, heading back toward Dorf Tirol, there's a bench with a glorious view over the Adige — and to your right the church frames beautifully against the Vinschgau valley.
text.it: Appena passata la chiesa di San Pietro, tornando verso Tirolo, c'è una panchina con una vista stupenda sull'Adige — e alla tua destra la chiesa fa da cornice perfetta con la Val Venosta.
text.de: Kurz nach der St.-Peter-Kirche, zurück Richtung Dorf Tirol, steht eine Bank mit herrlichem Blick über die Etsch — und rechts rahmt die Kirche schön das Vinschgau ein.
